Package in.co.rays.proj4.util

Class EmailMessage

java.lang.Object
in.co.rays.proj4.util.EmailMessage
public class EmailMessage extends Object
The EmailMessage class serves as a transient data holder object (POJO) to encapsulate details required for sending an email, including recipient address, subject line, message body, and formatting configuration type.
Version:
1.0
Author:
vinay

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    HTML_MSG
    Format flag constant indicating an HTML content profile.
    private String
    message
    Body content payload text of the message block.
    private int
    messageType
    Runtime track identifier signaling current formatting output style profile definition.
    private String
    subject
    Brief subject title text summarizing message purpose.
    static final int
    TEXT_MSG
    Format flag constant indicating a standard plain text content profile.
    private String
    to
    Recipient email address destination.

  • Constructor Details

    • EmailMessage

      public EmailMessage()
      Default no-argument constructor.

    • EmailMessage

      public EmailMessage(String to, String subject, String message)
      Parameterized constructor initialized with destination target data parameters.
      Parameters:
      to - the recipient's email address
      subject - the summary subject title text line
      message - the primary content body text block

  • Method Details

    • setTo

      public void setTo(String to)
      Sets the recipient's email address destination.
      Parameters:
      to - the tracking target destination string to set

    • getTo

      public String getTo()
      Retrieves the recipient's email address destination.
      Returns:
      the email destination string

    • setSubject

      public void setSubject(String subject)
      Sets the message subject line title text context.
      Parameters:
      subject - the text value to record as communication subject heading

    • getSubject

      public String getSubject()
      Retrieves the current message subject line string context.
      Returns:
      the recorded subject text string

    • setMessage

      public void setMessage(String message)
      Sets the core message body body payload context text string.
      Parameters:
      message - primary content string expression

    • getMessage

      public String getMessage()
      Retrieves the core body message body payload context text string.
      Returns:
      primary tracked body string structure expression

    • setMessageType

      public void setMessageType(int messageType)
      Configures format flag criteria definition styling filters (HTML vs Text).
      Parameters:
      messageType - standard structural flag parameter code values (1 for HTML, 2 for Text)

    • getMessageType

      public int getMessageType()
      Retrieves format flag criteria profile tracking references.
      Returns:
      structural type constant code indicator integer mapping value
